_notes: Edit only the items inside the events array.
Use dates in YYYY-MM-DD format and times in 24-hour HH:MM format.

Set "month_only": true when you only know the month, not the day. The page then shows the month name (or a span like "May to September" if an end_date crosses months) instead of a made-up date, and the event stays listed for the whole month.
Use internal_url for a page on this website (e.g. /things-to-do/the-talyllyn-railway/) and external_url for the official event website.

To give an event its own page on this site, set internal_url to /events/<slug>/ and add src/content/events/<slug>.md (page description + links); the date and location here drive both the calendar and that page.
Most of these repeat every year: roll the dates forward each January to keep the calendar current.
Summaries are our own wording: do not paste descriptions from leaflets or other sites.

_example.title: Tywyn Example Event
_example.summary: A short summary for the event card.

events.title: New Year's Day Dip
events.summary: Start the year with a bracing dip in the sea, as hardy locals and visitors brave the cold to welcome in January.

events.title: Aberdovey Panto
events.summary: A much-loved start to the year, with a family pantomime staged by local performers at Aberdyfi's Neuadd Dyfi.

events.title: Winter Wildlife Walks
events.summary: Guided winter walks through the Dyfi Biosphere, looking out for the wildlife and plant life of the estuary and valley.

events.title: Valentine's at The Magic Lantern
events.summary: A romantic evening at Tywyn's independent Magic Lantern cinema, with themed screenings and a few special treats.

events.title: St David's Day Celebrations
events.summary: Wales marks its national day with parades, music and cultural events in honour of Dewi Sant, the country's patron saint.

events.title: Spring Craft Fair
events.summary: Pick up handmade crafts, art and gifts from makers across the area at this spring fair in Aberdyfi's Neuadd Dyfi.

events.title: Aberdyfi Half Marathon
events.summary: A spring half marathon starting and finishing at Neuadd Dyfi, with a scenic route out along the Dyfi valley.

events.title: Easter Open Day
events.summary: A family-friendly Easter open day at Aberdyfi's RNLI lifeboat station, with the chance to meet the volunteer crew.

events.title: Dafad Goch Soapbox Race
events.summary: Home-built soapbox carts hurtle down Aberdyfi's steep Copperhill Street in this fun and slightly chaotic spectacle.

events.title: Tywyn Light Fest
events.summary: Tywyn's seafront comes alive over two days with light installations, live music and family entertainment on the Promenade.

events.title: Slip to the Brit
events.summary: A fun run along the beach from Tywyn to Aberdyfi, raising money for the Search and Rescue Dog Association.

events.title: Machynlleth Comedy Festival
events.summary: Three days of stand-up in nearby Machynlleth, with a line-up mixing well-known names and rising comedy talent.

events.title: Yarn Bombing Llwyngwril
events.summary: The knitters of Llwyngwril cover their village in colourful, often witty yarn-bombed displays right through the summer.

events.title: Aberdyfi Kite Festival
events.summary: Colourful kites of all shapes and sizes take to the skies above Aberdyfi's wide sandy beach.

events.title: Talyllyn Beer Festival
events.summary: A weekend of real ale, live music and steam trains on the historic Talyllyn Railway.

events.title: Aberdovey Regatta
events.summary: Dovey Yacht Club's flagship sailing fortnight on the Dyfi estuary, opening with a regatta day and continuing with dinghy racing and evening socials.

events.title: Race the Train
events.summary: Tywyn's famous challenge, where runners race a Talyllyn Railway steam train across country between Tywyn and Abergynolwyn.

events.title: Aberdyfi Food Festival
events.summary: A celebration of local food and drink in Aberdyfi, bringing together producers, street food and live music.

events.title: DoveyFest
events.summary: A relaxed community festival around Aberdyfi's wharf, with craft stalls, family activities and live entertainment.

events.title: Tywyn Live
events.summary: A free, all-day celebration of live music on Tywyn's seafront, with a line-up spanning jazz, rock, indie and live beats.

events.title: Tom Rolt Steam and Vehicle Rally
events.summary: A vintage vehicle and steam rally at the Talyllyn Railway in memory of preservationist Tom Rolt, with classic cars, traction engines and veteran transport.

events.title: Barmouth Walking Festival
events.summary: A programme of guided walks exploring the coast, hills and history around nearby Barmouth.

events.title: Talyllyn Railway Heritage Weekend
events.summary: A heritage weekend on the Talyllyn Railway, with period trains and talks on the line's history and its rescue by the writer Tom Rolt.

events.title: Aberystwyth Comedy Festival
events.summary: A weekend of live stand-up across venues in the lively seaside town of Aberystwyth.

events.title: Bonfire Night
events.summary: Bonfires and firework displays light up the November sky in both Tywyn and Aberdyfi.

events.title: Aberdovey Christmas Market
events.summary: Aberdyfi welcomes the festive season with seasonal stalls, food, gifts and entertainment.

events.title: Tywyn Christmas Market
events.summary: Festive craft and food stalls in Tywyn, held alongside the town's Christmas lights switch-on.

events.title: Christmas Carol Concerts
events.summary: Community carol concerts and singalongs fill churches across the area through December.

events.title: New Year's Eve Party
events.summary: Ring in the new year with live music and fireworks at Neuadd Dyfi and pubs across Aberdyfi and Tywyn.
